actionable_feedback: {'id': 'F1', 'title': 'Attach standalone validation artifact', 'details': 'Add a validation_checks_output artifact: a script (Python/Node) or unit-test file that programmatically recomputes priorities, breach flags, and remediation envelopes from the input packet and writes/verifies the same sod_solver.csv. Include a short README with exact commands to run (e.g., python validate.py).'}

{'id': 'F2', 'title': 'Provide sensitivity analysis log', 'details': 'Provide a sensitivity_analysis_log artifact that records the +/-5% runs (inputs, code or spreadsheet formulas, outputs) and any edge-case tests (ties, missing values). Include the exact commands used and the resulting CSV or JSON outputs so verifiers can reproduce the stability claims.'}

{'id': 'F3', 'title': 'Include an executable reproduction example', 'details': 'Bundle a one-file executable reproduction (e.g., repro.py) that, when run, reads the embedded packet or a small supplied CSV and produces sod_solver.csv and access_remediation.md so verifiers can run end-to-end.'}

{'id': 'F4', 'title': 'Normalize reporting flags', 'details': 'Reconcile the artifact_presence_ok and related flags in a single canonical grading summary inside access_remediation.md (or a grading_summary.json) so nested outputs do not show contradictory presence flags.'}

{'id': 'F5', 'title': 'Optional: augment economic rationale', 'details': 'If real remediation cost data is available, include conservative itemized cost estimates or alternative allocation scenarios; otherwise label envelopes clearly as heuristic envelopes and document assumptions.'}
feedback_summary: Baseline attempt correctly computed priorities, applied escalation rules, produced the remediation memo and CSV, and passed deterministic artifact contract checks. Two non-blocking issues remain: (1) missing standalone reproducibility artifacts (validation_checks_output script/unit tests and sensitivity_analysis_log) that prevent one-click verifier execution; (2) minor serialization/reporting inconsistency where artifact_presence_ok toggles between true/false across nested grader/verifier outputs. Numeric computations and recommendations are internally consistent and defensible given the provided packet.

extra_model_fields.evidence_grounding: Numeric recomputation in sod_solver.csv and access_remediation.md matches the trace compute_validate step; sensitivity +/-5% values and budget envelopes align with the memo.
limitations: Grading used artifact previews and trace; some required standalone validation/sensitivity artifacts were not produced as separate files.
Remediation envelopes are heuristic allocations; domain experts should validate cost assumptions.
recommended_followups: Include one-file executable reproduction (python script or spreadsheet with formulas) for one-click verification.
Reconcile artifact_presence_ok reporting in a canonical summary file.
extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: Two non-blocking issues: missing standalone reproducibility artifacts (validation_checks_output, sensitivity_analysis_log) and minor inconsistent artifact_presence_ok flags across nested grader outputs.

actionable_feedback.details: If real remediation cost data is available, include conservative itemized cost estimates or alternative allocation scenarios; otherwise label envelopes clearly as heuristic envelopes and document assumptions.
